props.bucketIndex: Index of the threshold bucket whose color fills the cell.
props.color: Explicit fill color. Used when `bucketIndex` is not set.
props.disabled: Renders the cell in a disabled when toggled off.
props.rounded: Cell corner radius. Accepts a number or string with `px` or `%` units only — the value is passed directly to the SVG `<rect>` `rx`/`ry` attributes.

slots.default: Slot used to render custom content inside the legend cell via a `<foreignObject>`.
